text: Exclude direct parent-child pairs from duplicate detection
description:
Follow-up from 01f4ab1a (threshold recalibration). Duplicate detection is structurally noisy: a high-cosine parent<->child pair is almost always an intentional summary/detail split, not an accidental duplicate to merge. Surfacing these as "duplicates" misdirects.

Change: in packages/backend/src/routers/project.ts, skip any pair where one aim is a direct parent or child of the other, in both (a) findDuplicates (find_duplicate_aims) and (b) graphHygiene duplicate-cluster union-find. Adjacency via aimMap: x and y are linked if x.supportedAims includes y OR x.supportingConnections includes y.

Note: the genuine "collapse a redundant nesting" case is now handled by merge_aims (which accepts parent-child pairs) and surfaced separately by graph_hygiene's collapseCandidates — so it does NOT need to live in the duplicate signal. Precision over recall here.

reflections.context: Follow-up to bge threshold recalibration (01f4ab1a): duplicate detection on this graph is structurally noisy because high cosine often means an intentional parent->child detail-split, not an accidental dup.
reflections.outcome: Added an isDirectParentChild adjacency guard to both findDuplicates and the graphHygiene duplicate-cluster union-find in project.ts. Live verification: clusters 4->1; parent-child splits (.bowman-gitignore, Gemini-tier) excluded, genuine sibling-dup (watchdog buckets) retained.
reflections.lesson: Threshold tuning has a precision ceiling set by graph STRUCTURE, not the number. Excluding structurally-explained pairs (parent-child) is a higher-leverage precision lever than nudging the cosine cutoff. The collapse-a-nesting case belongs in graph_hygiene's collapseCandidates, not the duplicate signal.
reflections.pattern: When a similarity/ranking signal is noisy, subtract the cases the graph already explains structurally before tightening the numeric threshold.

status.comment: Added isDirectParentChild guard to findDuplicates + graphHygiene union-find in project.ts. Verified on live graph: duplicate clusters 4->1; the .bowman-gitignore and Gemini-tier parent-child splits dropped, the non-parent-child watchdog-bucket pair correctly retained.
